games.title: City Architect
games.description: Design, optimize, and stress-test a living city with dynamic traffic, power grids, and AI citizens.

games.title: HyperDrive Racer
games.description: Feel precision handling on futuristic tracks with live telemetry overlays tuned for performance freaks.

games.title: Arena Legends
games.description: Draft heroes, outplay opponents, and climb the global ladder in a fast-paced 5v5 arena.

games.title: Tactical Strike
games.description: Sharpen your aim and utility usage in highly tactical rounds where every pixel and frame matters.

games.title: Nightfall Asylum
games.description: Navigate an abandoned facility where every light flicker and echo is rendered in chilling detail.

games.title: Deep Space Echoes
games.description: Drift through a silent starship where something hunts in the vents and the UI flickers with warnings.

games.title: Circuit Clash
games.description: Fast, electric matches perfect for warming up, practicing mechanics, or settling scores with friends.
